title: What is So Special About Benzene? A Comparison of Selected Carbon and Silicon Isomers E6H6 (E = C, Si)

Quantum chemical calculations using density functional theory at the BP86/def2-TZVPP level and ab initio methods CCSD(T) and MP2 are reported for the structures of the monocyclic molecules E6H6 (E =...
